title: Senior Doctor - Torrent Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Torrent Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
We at Torrent Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Senior Doctor based out of Chennai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Torrent Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Torrent Pharmaceuticals Consulting Pvt Ltd!
